channel.title: Yangming Li's Blog
channel.description: AI/ML, Product, Engineering, and Investing insights by Yangming Li

item.title: Building a Practical Enterprise Data Agent with Microsoft Fabric Data Agent and Azure AI Foundry
item.description: A practical architecture guide for using Microsoft Fabric Data Agent, Fabric IQ ontology, MCP endpoints, and Microsoft Foundry Agent Service to build governed enterprise data agents.

item.title: RAG Evaluation Is Not a Score: How to Measure Retrieval, Generation, and System Reliability
item.description: A practical framework for measuring RAG retrieval quality, generation faithfulness, and system reliability across offline evaluation, online testing, and continuous monitoring.

item.title: A 90% Accurate Model That Still Loses Money: Why Churn Prediction Fails Without Uplift Thinking
item.description: Why high-accuracy churn prediction can improve renewal rate while losing revenue, and how uplift thinking targets incremental renewals instead of risk scores.

item.title: Beyond A/B Testing: A Practical Guide to Uplift Modeling in Industry
item.description: How uplift modeling moves from average A/B test impact to user-level incremental effect, with CATE, meta-learners, Qini, AUUC, decile lift, and online ROI.

item.title: The Most Important Part of AI Agents Is Not Prompting. It Is Evaluation.
item.description: Why production AI agents need custom eval sets, trajectory checks, calibrated judges, regression tests, and business-ready metrics.

item.title: Testing and Evaluating Copilot Agents: From Demo to Reliable AI System
item.description: A schema-first guide to testing Copilot Studio agents with evaluation sets, custom graders, validation gates, human review, and post-publish monitoring.

item.title: 做产品和工程优化时，先别急着自动化
item.description: 把“先质疑需求，再删除步骤，然后才优化、提速、自动化”整理成一篇适合产品、工程、流程团队直接落地的中文方法论。

item.title: 风险投资其实是“防风险投资”
item.description: 张师傅的退休实验室关于 VC 本质、Vintage、投人、一级与二级市场差异，以及投资智慧的一篇长文。

item.title: Docker in Machine Learning: Ensuring Reproducibility and Seamless Deployment
item.description: A comprehensive guide to using Docker for ML/DS projects - from environment setup to reproducible experiments and production deployment pipelines.

item.title: MLOps Essential Skills: Production ML Systems
item.description: Master MLOps principles and implementation with practical examples using MLflow and Weights & Biases for efficient model lifecycle management and automated deployments.

item.title: The Essence of a Successful Product: Insights for Product Managers
item.description: A deep dive into what truly makes a product successful from a product manager's perspective - balancing user needs, business goals, and technical constraints.

item.title: Decoder-Only Architecture Dominance in Modern LLMs
item.description: Why decoder-only architectures have become the standard in LLMs - technical analysis of efficiency, training dynamics, and architectural advantages over encoder-decoder approaches.

item.title: Understanding Kubernetes: A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: A deep dive into Kubernetes architecture, components, and practical implementation for container orchestration at scale with hands-on examples.
